name: auvik-mcp
description: Query Auvik network monitoring data — tenants, devices, networks, interfaces, components, configs, alerts, statistics, and billing — for MSP AI agents.
long_description: Use this server when you need to inspect Auvik network monitoring data. Covers multi-tenant read workflows: list/get tenants, enumerate devices (with type/vendor/status filters plus detail, extended, warranty, and lifecycle views), browse discovered networks and interfaces, list device components, retrieve stored device configurations, fetch device/availability/interface/service/component/OID performance statistics over a time range, list and get alerts, read entity notes and audit logs, and pull client and per-device billing usage. Schemas, filters, and enum values are verified against the live Auvik OpenAPI spec. Ideal for MSP automation agents that need real-time network visibility across multiple client tenants.

auvik_username.title: Auvik Username
auvik_username.description: Your Auvik API username (often an email address used for API access)

auvik_region.title: Auvik Region
auvik_region.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default (https://auvikapi.us1.my.auvik.com/v1). Set to a region code (us2, us3, us4, eu1, eu2, au1, ca1) only if your Auvik tenant is on a non-US1 shard.
